heading: Tonight
text: Widespread rain showers. Lows from the upper 30s to low 40s. Winds turning to the southwest near 10 mph, gusting 20 to 30 mph then diminishing through the early morning.

heading: Sunday
text: Morning showers ending, then skies becoming increasingly sunny. Highs from the mid 40s to mid 50s. West wind at 5 to 10 mph, with occasional gusts over the peaks.

heading: Sunday Night
text: Clearing skies. Lows through the 30s, with a few 20s in the cold spots in the north. Light west wind with occasional gusts near 15 mph over the Greens.
